nasb.text: Her cities have become an object of horror, A parched land and a desert, A land in which no man lives And through which no son of man passes.

esv.text: Her cities have become a horror, a land of drought and a desert, a land in which no one dwells, and through which no son of man passes.

cnv.text: 它的城鎮變為荒涼， 成為乾旱的地和沙漠， 沒有人住在裡面， 也沒有人經過。

ccb.text: 她的城邑沦为干旱的荒漠， 杳无人迹。
